statement.en: Lean 4 progress: Measure Theory — 14 theorems/lemmas, 0 sorry, 0 axiom
statement.ja: Lean 4 進捗: Measure Theory — 定理 14 / sorry 0 / axiom 0
statement.headerDoc:
STEP 1008 — MeasureTheory / Layer 4 統計推論基礎
  藤本伸樹 + Claude Opus 4.7 — 2026-04-28

  Demonstrates Mathlib v4.27 measure-theoretic / probabilistic primitives
  in the Rei-AIOS project. Foundation for Layer 4 (経験社会科学) of the
  formalization stack (paper144).

  Topics:
    §1. Discrete probability over Fin n (finite enumeration)
    §2. Concrete examples: coin flips, dice
    §3. Independence (definition)
    §4. Counting probability examples (sums, intersections)

  Approach: We use `Finset.card` over `Finset.univ` and `decide` /
  `native_decide` for concrete cases. Abstract Markov / Chebyshev

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
